hooks.command: g="graphify-out/graph.json"; [ -f "$g" ] || exit 0; n=$(find docs CLAUDE.md README.md -name "*.md" -newer "$g" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$n" -ge 3 ] || { [ "$n" -ge 1 ] && [ -n "$(find "$g" -mtime +7 2>/dev/null)" ]; }; then echo "Knowledge graph is stale: $n doc file(s) changed since the last graph build. Consider running /graphify . --update (see docs/graphify.md). Below-threshold changes are fine to ignore."; fi
